# Banner PreLogin
-- banners/banner --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Banner
metadata:
  name: banner
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  type: PreLogin
  message:
    inline: "Unauthorized access is prohibited."
-- state --
{
  "openconfig-system:system": {
    "config": {
      "login-banner": "Unauthorized access is prohibited."
    }
  }
}
